name: pre-commit-python-format
description: Format Python files and validate syntax before commits

commands.name: Format Python files
args: & { Get-ChildItem -Path . -Filter '*.py' -Recurse -Exclude '__pycache__','.*' | Where-Object { $_.DirectoryName -notmatch '__pycache__|^\..*' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Checking $($_.Name)..."; python -m py_compile $_.FullName; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 1 } } }

commands.name: Check for personal config files
args: & { $files = git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM | Select-String -Pattern 'sync_to_kicad_config.ps1$|.*_config\.ps1$' -NotMatch '*template*'; if ($files) { Write-Host '❌ ERROR: Attempting to commit personal config file'; Write-Host $files; exit 1 } else { Write-Host '✅ No personal config files in commit'; exit 0 } }

commands.name: Verify TOML syntax
